name: BoomBox
short_description: BoomBox is a VR rhythm game blending music, fitness, and community. Download community maps directly in-game, enjoy full-body workouts with unique note placements, and pet an adorable virtual cat. Customize with skins and unlock achievements in vibrant, colorful environments!
detailed_description:
Are you ready to drum your way to a fitter, happier you? Look no further! The BoomBox team has prepared something special just for you, blending music, fitness, community, and an adorable virtual pet all in one electrifying package!

🎵 Music
BoomBox is the first VR Rhythm game that lets you download community maps directly from the game menu. That’s right—no more fiddling with third-party tools. Everything you need for an epic drumming session is right at your fingertips. Get ready to jam to endless community-created songs!

🏋️ Fitness
Get ready to sweat with BoomBox's circular note positions inspired by Wacca arcade designed to engage your entire arm and core. Our free wall placements and shapes will have you squatting, reaching, and moving like never before. It's a full-body workout disguised as a rhythm game!

🐾 Bonus: Pet the Cat!
As a delightful bonus, you can now pet an adorable virtual cat in BoomBox! It's the perfect way to unwind after a high-energy drumming session.

🎉 Extras
Unlock achievements, customize your experience with skins, and explore vibrant, colorful environments. BoomBox is packed with fun surprises to keep you coming back for more!

Join the BoomBox family and transform your drumming skills while getting fit and having a blast.

FEATURES
  • 33 core songs mapped [OST]
  • community maps downloadable from the game menu
  • 600+ DMCA-free songs for the community mapping
  • Multiplayer
  • Achievements, Skins, and other customization options
  • 20 unique designed environments
  • Editor - available for download from our website
  • Leaderbords
  • Meet Pupa: our lovely kitty will be part of your amazing adventures, don't forget to pet her!
